description.en:
Companion preloader for ModMixer (FS25_zzz_ModMixer).
Loads first (000_ prefix) and patches Utils.overwrittenFunction and Utils.appendedFunction to tag every wrapped function with chain metadata. ModMixer reads these tags at load time to verify and repair hook chains without needing the debug library or cross-mod globals.
Install alongside FS25_zzz_ModMixer. No configuration needed.
